item.title: I hate compilers
item.description: You'd think that given the same bytes of input you'd get the same bytes of output. lol. lmao. No, you don't. It's complicated.

item.title: Why are cached input tokens cheaper with AI services?
item.description: TL;DR: the GPU doesn't have to math as hard

item.title: Giving your Go apps Tigris superpowers
"No way to prevent this" say users of only language where this regularly happens
IPv6 zones in URLs are a mistake
item.description: Run away while you still can, it's not too late for you to avoid the curse of knowledge.

item.title: "No way to prevent this" say users of only package manager where this regularly happens
Dancing mad with sandboxing
item.description: Kefka is a Go-native shell sandbox with coreutils, Python via WebAssembly, and more. Learn the works of madness that went into making this happen!

item.title: "No way to prevent this" say users of only package manager where this regularly happens
